PurchaseAPaidDomainName.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters.
PurchaseAPaidDomainName.productVersion: The product version to purchase, including: Standard Edition ("discount") and Enterprise Edition ("flagship").
PurchaseAPaidDomainName.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing, either Prepaid or Postpaid; currently only Prepaid is supported.
PurchaseAPaidDomainName.billing.reservation: Reservation information; not required for Postpaid, but mandatory for Prepaid.
